case_title: SENIOR ASSIST OF THE PENINSULA, LLC. VS. TERESA GOLDHOFF ET AL

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF SENIOR ASSIST OF THE PENINSULA, LLC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,921.88 FILED BY SENIOR ASSIST OF THE PENINSULA, LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDHOFF, TERESA GOLDHOFF, PATRICIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2016 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SENIOR ASSIST OF THE PENINSULA, LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDHOFF, PATRICIA $1,921.88 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,001.88, AT PARTIES' REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST TERESA GOLDHOFF AND TERESA GOLDHOFF'S CROSS-COMPLAINT ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED FEB-16-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDHOFF, TERESA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-29-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-29-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE ON THE CROSS-COMPLAINT. DEFENDANT PATRICIA GOLDHOFF WAS PRESENT AND WAIVES SERVICE. TERESA GOLDHOFF WAS REPRESENTED BY PATRICIA GOLDHOFF. AT THE PARTIES' REQUEST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST TERESA GOLDHOFF AND TERESA GOLDHOFF'S CROSS-COMPLAINT ARE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
